title: Detection of fungal spores in vegetable production
subtitle: Ανίχνευση σπορίων μυκήτων σε καλλιέργειας κηπευτικών
description: A guide on the Sporsenz monitoring system for early detection of soil-borne fungal spores in vegetable production. It enables farmers to monitor fungal populations in field and hydroponic systems and supports timely disease management through laboratory analysis and actionable results via email.
